title: Gabor Szots
text: Home * People * Gabor Szots Gábor at MASPV 2004 [1] Gábor Szõts , a Hungarian chess player [2] , and as tester of chess programs, member of the CCRL group. He helped with the Hungarian translation for Arena and also served as tournament organizer at various Hungarian Chessprogram Open .
